calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-31-2013 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-16-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, Asset Acceptance LLC.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Sylvia H. Davis, an individual.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.
Declaratin of Gina Vincy and Amy Lief on file.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $41,327.93
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $475.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $41,802.93
Judgment signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-30-2013 Continued To Aug-20-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
